claims.evidence_text: the mean μ of plant height in the E1 environment was 77.18 ... E2 environment was 83.94 ... E3 environment was 69.43 ... mean μ of plant height under E4 environment was 72.72
claims.claim_summary: Mean winter wheat plant height across four environments ranged from about 69.4 to 83.9 cm.
methods: measured ground-to-spike-top (excluding awns) on 5 plants per plot, averaged; 239 varieties across 4 environments

claims.claim_summary: Observed winter wheat plant height across 239 varieties and four environments spanned a minimum of 50.41 cm to a maximum of 146.38 cm.
methods: descriptive statistics of plant height phenotyping across 4 environments (Table 1)

claims.evidence_text: Each plot consisted of two rows, each 1 meter long and spaced 0.2 meters apart, with a sowing density of 350,000 seeds per hectare, oriented in a north-south direction.
claims.claim_summary: Winter wheat trial plots were sown at a density of 350,000 seeds per hectare.

claims.claim_summary: Winter wheat trial rows were spaced 0.2 meters apart.
